{{CargoRelic
|name=Sword Throne
|class_id=21420
|rank=AAA
|affct=FAME
|birthday=09-26
|source=
|description=On Sept. 26, 434 BC, Clovis I united all of the Frankish tribes and forged this iron throne.<br>Clovis I destroyed the Kingdom of Soissons ruled by Syagrius. Afterwards, he conquered several smaller Frankish kingdoms by bribing the enemy's subordinates and inciting a son to kill his father. Through a series of actions, he also gathered weapons from various tribes and used them to create this throne.
|fame=73
|art=48
|fth=35
|civ=49
|tech=38
|ss1=Per 10k Power, Snail ATK +5<br>Per 10k Power, Snail DEF +5<br>Power: 90000/90000
|ss2=Per 10k Power, Snail ATK +5<br>Per 10k Power, Snail DEF +5<br>Power: 120000/120000
|ss3=Per 10k Power, Snail ATK +5<br>Per 10k Power, Snail DEF +5<br>Power: 150000/150000
|ss4=Per 10k Power, Snail ATK +5<br>Per 10k Power, Snail DEF +5<br>Power: 210000/210000
|ss5=Per 10k Power, Snail ATK +5<br>Per 10k Power, Snail DEF +5<br>Power: 270000/270000
|ss7=Per 10k Power, Snail ATK +5<br>Per 10k Power, Snail DEF +5<br>Power: 270000/270000<br>Snail ATK +70 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Arena skill II.png|50px]]Place in Snail Arena Compass: In Snail Arena, Water RES +15
|skill2=[[File:Arena skill II.png|50px]]Place in Snail Arena Compass: In Snail Arena, Water DMG +60
}}
